title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, September 17 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 17/09/2024
Image reference: 2024-09-17_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-september-17-2024_img1.png
Bulkers: S&P values have remaining mostly stable while NB Panamax have increased over the last week
Capesize (Newcastlemax) Mineral Charlie (205,200 DWT, Feb 2012, Hanjin Subic) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 38.8 mil, VV Value USD 37.36 mil
Capesize BC Alpha Prudence (178,000 DWT, Dec 2007, Shanghai Waigaoqiao Shipbuilding) sold to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 24.5 mil, VV Value USD 24.2 mil
Ultramax BC Eternal Hakata (61,400 DWT, Mar 2014, Imabari) sold to Unknown Greek buyers for USD 25 mil, VV Value USD 24.97 mil
Handy BC Elegant Emilie (33,200 DWT, Oct 2008, Shin Kochi) sold to Unknown Hong Kong, China buyers for USD 12.5 mil, VV Value USD 12.1 mil
Handy BC YC Fortitude (32,500 DWT, Mar 2011, Taizhou Maple Leaf Shipbuilding) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 11 mil, VV Value USD 11.59 mil
Tankers: Tanker values remained stable except for older tonnage LR1 values which softened again this week
MR2 (Chem/Prod) Tenacity (50,400 DWT, Jul 2014, Guangzhou CSSC Longxue Shipbuilding) sold to Aerio Shipmanagement for USD 40 mil (SS/DD Passed),
